scripts.failed-sets: python3 -c "import duckdb; conn = duckdb.connect('public/data/pokemon.duckdb', read_only=True); [print(r) for r in conn.execute('SELECT set_id, reason FROM failed_sets ORDER BY set_id').fetchall()] or print('None'); conn.close()"
scripts.missing-sets: python3 -c "import duckdb; conn = duckdb.connect('public/data/pokemon.duckdb', read_only=True); [print(r) for r in conn.execute(\"SELECT s.id, s.name, s.total FROM sets s LEFT JOIN tcg_cards c ON c.set_id=s.id GROUP BY s.id,s.name,s.total HAVING COUNT(c.id)=0 ORDER BY s.id\").fetchall()] or print('None'); conn.close()"
